evidence_for: goal 060 leg B (test-designer): conformance fixture capture — re-fetch of the 4 SAF §7 pinned electronic PTRs into crates/adapters/us_senate/fixtures/*/input.html, sha-verified against the pins (fail closed on drift)
protocol: docs/regimes/us_senate.md §2.1 session dance + §2.5 client-fingerprint constraint, verbatim

client.engine: Playwright chromium r1228 (Chromium 149.0.7827.55), headed, real browser
client.user_agent: stock Chromium 149 UA, untouched (identified-UA strings are mechanically 403'd — §2.5/E13)
client.identification: From: ssm.leo@outlook.com on every request to senate.gov hosts, injected at the network layer (route interception) — see incident below for why it must be host-scoped

politeness.incidents: none at the origin: zero 403s, zero 429s. Two aborted sessions (2 origin GETs each) ended CLIENT-side before the agreement POST: a context-global `From` extra header leaked onto the page's third-party CDN script loads (code.jquery.com, cdn.datatables.net, cdnjs.cloudflare.com); `From` is not a CORS-safelisted request header, the forced preflights failed, jQuery never loaded, and the agreement form's checkbox->submit handler never bound. Each abort was followed by a configuration change (never a blind retry): final config scopes the header to senate.gov hosts. LOAD-BEARING for the builder's fetch stage if it embeds a browser engine.

session_dance_observed.result: 302 -> /search/, landed 200 search page — agreement flag stored server-side

pin_verdict: 4/4 byte-identical to the SAF §7 pins and to the sha-named archives already in this directory (E4-E7) — third independent confirmation of raw-byte pin stability (after the spec leg's within-session and cross-session variance tests, E13)
expected_outputs_provenance: expected.silver.json / expected.gold.json authored parser-blind per docs/decisions/automation-policy.md: Pass A = test-designer hand transcription from the raw HTML; Pass B = independent fresh-context model transcription of the same bytes; cell-by-cell diff clean across all 40 rows (sole divergence: Pass B left `&` undecoded — markup-vs-text artifact, resolved to decoded text per SAF §6 text-node semantics). Mappings applied from SAF §3.2-§3.5/§5.1 tables; conventions in crates/adapters/us_senate/fixtures/MANIFEST.json.
